rows.finalText: The strongest thread around "What is the next right step in my calling" runs through Purpose / Calling with a right path emphasis. In Past, Moon (32) shows where things already stand: sensitivity and perception are heightened. The center of the sequence often decides whether the ending softens or sharpens. At the pivot, Present places Fish (34) at the center, where the theme that resources and flow patterns become central matters most. Future movement in Future and Scythe (10) points to urgent prioritization is required, provided the central pressure is handled honestly. Read it as movement, not a frozen verdict. A timeline spread is usually clearest when you trust the order of events. Each position changes the meaning of the next. Moon (32) with Fish (34) gives the clearest subtext: a blend of recognition and money, asking you to track cycles and communicate needs while staying alert to untracked inflow/outflow. Take one measured step and let the response tell you what matters next.
